evals.prompt: Download the Expedait specs for project 1 so I can review them locally.
evals.expected_output: Runs `projects download` with an output directory; does not delete anything.

assertions.name: downloads-project
assertions.description: Fetches the project's deliverables to disk

evals.prompt: Which Expedait projects do I have access to?
Show me deliverable 5 including its content and score.
evals.expected_output: Reads deliverable 5 with the content/score sections requested.

assertions.name: reads-deliverable
assertions.description: Runs deliverables get for id 5 with --include

evals.prompt: Give me the phase-grouped workspace view of project 1.
evals.expected_output: Uses the workspace command for the structure-aware view.
